arts.ttl: European football: Lookman’s late winner sends Atalanta top of Serie A
arts.sum: Atalanta beat Milan 2-1 to leapfrog Napoli at summit Inter third after comfortable win over Parma A late strike from Ademola Lookman secured Atalanta a hard-fought 2-1 win over Milan on Friday, lifting the hosts to the top of Serie A. Three minutes before full-time, a corner sailed across the box and an unmarked Lookman headed in the winner. The result propelled Atalanta to the top of the standings with 34 points, two ahead of Napoli, who will play fifth-placed Lazio at home on Sunday. Milan are seventh with 22 points. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Atalanta earn 9th straight win, go top of Serie A
arts.sum: A late strike from Ademola Lookman secured Atalanta a hard-fought 2-1 win over AC Milan on Friday, lifting the hosts to the top of Serie A.
